message:
feat(tests): add 9 new enrichment integration test suites for capability, claims, guardrails, and release gates

New test suites covering additional engine subsystems:

- capability_enrichment_integration: capability model property tests
- claim_entitlement_enrichment_integration: entitlement claim validation
- mock_seam_guardrail_enrichment_integration: seam guardrail edge cases
- obligation_integration_enrichment_integration: obligation lifecycle tests
- performance_regression_gate_enrichment_integration: regression gate
  threshold and verdict semantics
- release_gate_enrichment_integration: release gate pass/fail/skip coverage
- remote_capability_gate_enrichment_integration: remote capability
  handshake and timeout behavior
- self_adjusting_resolution_graph_enrichment_integration: adaptive
  resolution graph convergence and stability
- test_taxonomy_enrichment_integration: test classification and
  prioritization rule coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
